stemHtml: The following combinations of temperatures would most favour the formation of steam fog:

options.a: Air over water: 5°C, air at 2 000 ft: -5°C, land temp: 5°C.
options.b: Air over water: -5°C, air at 2 000 ft: 0°C, land temp: 10°C.
options.c: Air over water: 0°C, air at 2 000 ft: -5°C, land temp: -10°C.
options.d: Air over water: -15°C, air at 2 000 ft: -20°C, land temp: -18°C.
